name: Indoor Gym Equipment
tagline: Commercial-grade strength machines for home gyms, fitness studios & professional clubs
description: Our Indoor Gym Equipment range covers plate-loaded and selectorised strength machines engineered with rectangular steel-tube frames, PU-cushioned pads and silicone-grip handles. Every machine is built for daily, high-repetition commercial use and backed by our standard frame warranty.

name: Outdoor Gym Equipment
tagline: Weatherproof fitness stations for parks, residential societies & public spaces
description: Our Outdoor Gym Equipment range is built for unattended, all-weather public use — galvanised and powder-coated steel frames, sealed bearings and tamper-resistant fittings designed to survive sun, rain and heavy daily footfall.
